items.content_html: Level up your Obsidian notes with interactive progress bars! 📝📊 Customize and track your progress directly in markdown, click to update, and right-click to reset – because who doesn’t love a bit of visual motivation? 🎯 Persistent, customizable, and always ready to help you crush your goals!
items.title: mathe00/obsidian-progress-bar-plugin: Level up your Obsidian notes with interactive progress bars! 📝📊 Customize and track your progress directly in markdown, click to update, and right-click to reset – because who doesn’t love a bit of visual motivation? 🎯 Persistent, customizable, and always ready to help you crush your goals!

items.content_html: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window. So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid. Enjoy it!
items.title: gitcpy/diagram-zoom-drag: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window.  So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid.  Enjoy it!

items.content_html: Connect your notes like a pro! 🔗 This Obsidian plugin scans your markdown files, detects potential links, and suggests connections. With caching for speed, a sleek modal for link suggestions, and batch link selection, you'll be weaving your notes together effortlessly! 🕸️✨
items.title: mathe00/obsidian-better-auto-linker-plugin: Connect your notes like a pro! 🔗 This Obsidian plugin scans your markdown files, detects potential links, and suggests connections. With caching for speed, a sleek modal for link suggestions, and batch link selection, you'll be weaving your notes together effortlessly! 🕸️✨

items.content_html: Obsidian Cloud Storage is a powerful and user-friendly plugin designed to seamlessly integrate cloud storage capabilities into your Obsidian workflow. This plugin allows you to effortlessly upload your attachments to the cloud, freeing up local storage space and enabling easy sharing and access across all your devices.
items.title: yingjialong/obsidian-CloudStorage: Obsidian Cloud Storage is a powerful and user-friendly plugin designed to seamlessly integrate cloud storage capabilities into your Obsidian workflow. This plugin allows you to effortlessly upload your attachments to the cloud, freeing up local storage space and enabling easy sharing and access across all your devices.
